definitions.text: That which is or may be seized by animals to be devoured.
examples: The deer became prey to the lion.

definitions.text: A person or thing given up as a victim.
A living thing, usually an animal, that is eaten by another living thing.
examples: The rabbit was eaten by the coyote, so the rabbit is the coyote's prey.
Stranded without any weapons, we made very easy prey.
